title: Hot Bee Remote Control Unicorn Robot Toy for Girls - LED Dancing, Rechargeable STEM Learning Toys, for Kids Ages 3 4 5 6 Years old, Preschool Children's Presents for Girl, Purple
features: Adorable and Interactive Unicorn Robot Toy: This purple remote control unicorn robot for girls features a charming design with dazzling LED unicorn horn and wings. It performs a variety of fun movements, such as gliding, running, turning, sitting, standing, and dancing—all at the touch of a button. The unicorn also plays delightful music, enhancing the interactive experience and adding an extra layer of excitement. It's perfect for kids to operate independently and enjoy endless fun.

Safe and Rechargeable: Crafted from non-toxic, skin-friendly materials, this unicorn gifts for girls ensures your child's safety during play. It offers 50-70 minutes of uninterrupted interactive fun on a single 2-hour charge. The remote control requires 2 AAA batteries (not included).

Realistic and Engaging Play Experience: Enhance your child's playtime with the robotic unicorn, a part of our electronic pets toys collection. It comes with a comb so girls can brush and braid the unicorn's hair! The remote control allows the unicorn to skillfully avoid obstacles, fostering creativity and logical thinking in your child. This interactive experience combines imaginative play with the fun of music and robotics.

Perfect Gift for Girls Ages 3 and Up: This RC unicorn robot toy is ideal for preschool STEM learning and makes an exciting holiday gift for girls aged 3, 4, 5, and 6 years old. With its charming design and interactive features, it captures the imagination and encourages educational play. Whether it's a Christmas gift, birthday present, or just a special surprise, this unicorn robot will quickly become their favorite companion.

Complete Package Includes: Each package contains 1 x Unicorn Robot, 1 x Remote Control, 1 x Comb, 1 x USB Charging Cable, and 1 x User Manual. Everything your child needs for a magical play experience is included!
description: Product Description Does robot unicorn come with a battery? Does the remote control have batteries? The robot unicorn toy comes with rechargeable batteries and USB line, the remote control does not come with batteries, you need to match 2 AAA batteries by yourself. Would this purple unicorn robot toy be a good birthday gift for a 2 year old girl? Unicorn robot toy is suitable as a birthday gift or Christmas gift or holiday gift for 3 4 5 6 years old little girls Does the robot unicorn go in a sleep mode? If the robot signalis successfuly connected for 6 minutes without operation, it will be shut down automatically.On the back of the robot's head there is the power on/off button, press and hold for 3 seconds to turn it on/off. Does this toy work on carpet？ We recommend that you use the unicorn robot toy on wooden floors or short-pile carpets. What is the remote control distance of this unicorn robot? The effective distance of the remote control is about 10 meters, 5 meters within the distance of the remote control is better
